/usr/bin/ar qc libtr069_core.a CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/UciAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/DataModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/transformer/lua_transformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/HttpClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/SoapBuilder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/SoapParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/CwmpStateMachine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/DownloadManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/RebootHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/cwmp/rpc_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/CwmpSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/Md5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/ConnectionRequestServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tr069_core.dir/src/Tr069Daemon.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtr069_core.a
